Name: Predator
Behavior: Mutation 0: Chases the player and dashes. It also surrounds itself in several projectiles that circle the boss.  Mutation 1(50%HP/45 sec): No longer dashes but starts to emit projectiles in every direction every so often.

Name: Invoker
Behavior: Mutation 0: Every two seconds creates a area of projectiles around the players that spawn after a second of priming. Mutation 1(75%HP/30 sec): More projectiles spawn in a much wider area around the player. Mutation 2(40%HP/60 sec): Speed increases by 150%, runs all around the area and creates a circle of projectiles around the player.
